a223-1.resolution: wq-938 completed s1916 — credential recycling blocklist expanded with word-boundary regex \b\d{3,4}\+?\s*(?:sessions?|iterations?|runs?|cycles?)\b/i. s1919 (first E session after fix) shows zero credential recycling flags. Pattern '1914 sessions' would now be caught.

a223-1.metric_after: 0/1 E sessions flagged since fix (s1919 clean)

a223-2.resolution: wq-939 completed s1917 — safeJson guard in external.js catches non-ok HTTP responses, converting them to clean error messages. Ctxly recall now returns 'Ctxly error: HTTP 404' instead of crashing on JSON parse. Upstream API returning 404 is a different issue (their service, not our code).
a223-2.metric_before: Ctxly recall returned 'Unexpected token p in JSON at position 4'
a223-2.metric_after: Ctxly recall returns clean error 'HTTP 404 — 404 page not found'. Guard works. API is down upstream.
